data.body:
G3 child-coverage audit (parent f89d-e54d-203d-4ee0 × THIS child 33d0 "Collapse the dual outbound applier paths to one production path"), 4-bucket per parent criterion, cross-checked against the WHOLE sibling roster (2359/59ef/822a/8937/fe57). VERDICT: clean pairing — no G3 coverage finding attributable to this child; no uncovered parent criterion remains across the roster.

OWNED — FULLY covered by THIS child:
- Parent AC "Outbound application is collapsed to a single production path (no parallel applier remains)" → 33d0 AC1 (exactly one outbound applier path remains; retired path deleted, no dead separately-tested applier code). FULLY.
- Parent AC "The retired outbound applier path is deleted" → 33d0 AC1 (deletion) + 33d0 AC2 (behavioral-parity gate verified BEFORE deletion). FULLY.
- Parent SC "Outbound sync is exercised through the production code path, not a parallel dead path" → 33d0 AC1 + AC3 (single multi-sub-op UPDATE — fields+comments+labels+links+parent — driven through the production path, each sub-op asserted). FULLY.

CONTRIBUTED: parent AC "all six child stories closed; full reconciler suite green" via 33d0 AC4; parent SC "new tests assert behavior/contract … zero change-detector tests" via 33d0 AC5 (asserts effects/sub-op outcomes, never mock-call-counts).

DELEGATION — parent criteria this child does NOT own are correctly assigned to named siblings; declared OUT item (sub-op telemetry → story E/2359) is consistent with the roster:
- AC SSOT snapshot schema + AC fetcher-validated-vs-schema + AC each-differ-reads-validated + AC round-trip contract through production path w/ real fixtures + SC producer/consumers cannot drift → 8937 (AC1/AC2/AC3) + fe57 + 59ef.
- AC sub-op telemetry surfaced + AC computed>0 && applied==0 fails loudly (warn-first) + SC silent no-op fails a test/canary → 2359.
- AC bidirectional comment/link/parent round-trip asserted hermetically + AC every expected-bug probe guard de-encoded + SC bidirectional round-trips / no probe encodes a bug as expected → 822a.

ANTI-FP — parent AC "A documented anti-change-detector guardrail for reconciler tests is committed and referenced by new tests (owned by story B)" is FULLY covered, NOT an absence: the AC verbatim names its owner (story B = sibling 8937). Under the G3 ANTI-FP rule (covered-by-definition by a named consumer counts). Not filed.

4-bucket summary: FULLY (owned by THIS child) — collapse to single path, retired path deleted, SC production-path exercised; CONTRIBUTED — suite green + zero change-detector; COVERED-BY-NAMED-SIBLING — schema/contract/round-trip (8937/fe57/59ef), telemetry/canary (2359), round-trip/probe (822a), documented guardrail (8937, named owner); STRUCTURAL/AGGREGATE — all six closed/suite green. UNCOVERED — none. No G3 finding for this pairing.
